note: FIRM July dairy committed NOW: 6/29 (8) + 7/13 (12) + 7/20 GROWTH (8) + 7/27 (12) = 40 batches / ~2,664 cs. 12-batch/run is a HARD cap. The 7/20 back-to-back is committed to LEAVE ROOM FOR GROWTH (3 active NYC doors + 2-wk safety + DeCicco's cushion), NOT left out. Discipline that keeps this from being the May mistake: a HARD cancel checkpoint ~7/13 (freeze) that we ACTUALLY fire if the doors haven't placed POs, and Nathan is told upfront it's the flex run (no surprise back-out). Accepted trade: a possible flagged trim on Nathan, bounded to one run. Checkpoint: 6/16 Fairway reorder (refine SKU split, not dairy); ~7/13 doors PO go/no-go. Planner: production-planner-july.html.
